notes: Offline mode works, game runs with low performance (30 fps low-medium settings in 1080p). Dual monitor OK. Minimizing the game can cause performance issues. Multiplayer doesn't work at all due to anti-cheat protection, that's the reason I'd rate it as "bronze" because this is a multiplayer game.
title: Insurgency: Sandstorm

notes: Runs decent enough at 50-70fps on high-ish. There's some graphical glitches here and there. No online play (due to EAC) unless you play on non-EAC servers which results in no progress towards ranking or currency for cosmetics. On one Checkpoint map (Crossing), my game always crashes and locks up my computer within minutes of playing on the map. The other Checkpoint maps work fine though.
